name: Vegetarian Worcestershire Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup soy sauce or mushroom soy sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Allow the sauce to cool before storing it in a jar in the refrigerator.
4. This recipe makes about 2 cups of vegetarian Worcestershire sauce.
By Bryanna Grogan
Per Tablespoon: Calories: 10; Protein: 0 gm; Carbohydrates: 3 gm; Fat: 0 gm.
